testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel displays Data Cleanup button in grid toolbar
testcase.classname: displays Data Cleanup button in grid toolbar

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel opens panel when Data Cleanup button clicked
testcase.classname: opens panel when Data Cleanup button clicked

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel panel contains required form elements
OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel column select is populated with text columns
testcase.classname: column select is populated with text columns

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel overlay appears when panel is open
testcase.classname: overlay appears when panel is open

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel close button hides panel
OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel overlay click hides panel
OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel apply button stays disabled without preview
testcase.classname: apply button stays disabled without preview

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel typing in find field triggers debounced status update
testcase.classname: typing in find field triggers debounced status update

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel find field cleared on panel reopen
testcase.classname: find field cleared on panel reopen

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Panel replace field accepts empty value (delete mode)
testcase.classname: replace field accepts empty value (delete mode)

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Preview preview area empty on panel open
testcase.classname: preview area empty on panel open

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Preview status shows loading then result after find input
testcase.classname: status shows loading then result after find input

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Preview preview table uses dc-preview-table class when rows returned
testcase.classname: preview table uses dc-preview-table class when rows returned

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Preview apply button becomes enabled after preview finds matches
testcase.classname: apply button becomes enabled after preview finds matches

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Preview apply button disabled again after clear
testcase.classname: apply button disabled again after clear

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Apply apply triggers POST to api/data_cleanup.php
OpenSparrow – Data Cleanup Apply after apply: apply button returns to disabled
testcase.classname: after apply: apply button returns to disabled
